prompt_text:
### Demographics: 53-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 12 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class III)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent)
MASH
Body mass index category: Normal
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Major Depressive Disorder
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Cataract (status post surgery)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 3 years ago; 15 cigarettes/day for 10 years; ~7.5 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Sertraline (50 mg daily), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 48.3 kg; Height 157.4 cm; BMI 19.5 kg/m²; Blood pressure 132/82 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.3%; 9 months ago 8.3%; 6 months ago 8.3%; 3 months ago 8.4%; current 8.7%), FPG (12 months ago 204mg/dL; 9 months ago 216mg/dL; 6 months ago 209mg/dL; 3 months ago 221mg/dL; current 183mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 49.3kg; 9 months ago 49.1kg; 6 months ago 45.1kg; 3 months ago 45.1kg; current 48.3kg), Height (12 months ago 157.4cm; 9 months ago 157.4cm; 6 months ago 157.4cm; 3 months ago 157.4cm; current 157.4cm), BMI (12 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 18.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 18.0kg/m²; current 19.5kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 130mmHg; 9 months ago 132mmHg; 6 months ago 131mmHg; 3 months ago 132mmHg; current 132mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 83mmHg; 9 months ago 84mmHg; 6 months ago 83mmHg; 3 months ago 84mmHg; current 82mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 45U/L; 9 months ago 43U/L; 6 months ago 40U/L; 3 months ago 37U/L; current 51U/L), AST (12 months ago 71U/L; 9 months ago 76U/L; 6 months ago 65U/L; 3 months ago 67U/L; current 79U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.5mg/dL; current 0.6mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 28mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 27mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 24mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 21mL/min/1.73m²; current 21mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 457mg/g; 9 months ago 344mg/g; 6 months ago 357mg/g; 3 months ago 385mg/g; current 558mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 96mg/dL; 9 months ago 89mg/dL; 6 months ago 91mg/dL; 3 months ago 89mg/dL; current 92mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 37mg/dL; 9 months ago 35mg/dL; 6 months ago 38mg/dL; 3 months ago 37mg/dL; current 36mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 166mg/dL; 9 months ago 182mg/dL; 6 months ago 180mg/dL; 3 months ago 183mg/dL; current 172mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.0g/dL; 6 months ago 11.2g/dL; 3 months ago 11.9g/dL; current 10.9g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.33 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
